methodology: Heuristic intent from slug+title keywords (clinical_concept, comparison, prioritization, management_treatment, migration_international_nurse, exam_strategy). Not GSC-backed.
thinClusterWarnings: Many blog-topic-clusters and long-form *topics* are metadata-only until imported to Prisma.
Regional manifests under nursenest-core/data/blog-manifest may be empty placeholders — check each file.
Sitemap lists only DB-published slugs — repo-only definitions are invisible to sitemap XML.
